instructions: This is a private-equity / private-credit capital call notice. Extract the fund-level fields. Return monetary amounts as plain numbers (no currency symbols, no thousands separators). Dates as written. currency is the 3-letter ISO code (default USD if a $ amount with no other currency).

descriptions.notice_date: date the notice is dated, as ISO YYYY-MM-DD
descriptions.due_date: payment due date, as ISO YYYY-MM-DD
descriptions.total_called: total capital called in THIS notice (a single number)
descriptions.investment_amount: portion of the call for investments/acquisitions
descriptions.management_fee: the management fee AMOUNT in this call (not the rate)
descriptions.fund_expenses: fund expenses portion of the call
descriptions.commitment_base: AGGREGATE total fund commitments used as the management-fee base - one total number, never a per-LP list
descriptions.mgmt_fee_rate: annual management fee rate as a percent number, e.g. 2.0
descriptions.num_limited_partners: count of LPs in the call schedule
